text:
Host nation France take on archrivals Germany in a Group B matchup at Pierre Mauroy Stadium in Lille, France.

Save

Share

This blog is now closed, thanks for joining us. These were the updates on the France vs Germany 2024 Olympics Group B men’s basketball game in Lille on Friday, August 2.
